summary: Non-MLB Team Logo - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a non-MLB team has a matchup against an MLB team

**NOTE:** These types of matchups occur during Spring Training

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a game tile for a matchup between a non-MLB team and an MLB team
steps.result:
THEN a feed select modal is displayed
AND in the header of the feed select modal, the logo for the non-MLB team is displayed as a generic baseball
